subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sacrificed thy spirit, thy soul, thy life, thy body, thy heart and thine essence in the path of God, and hast striven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انفق روحه و نفسه و حیاته و جسمه و فواده و ذاته فی سبیل الله و سعی فی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
